meaning: 约克角[澳大利亚东北部](在约克角半岛),<板球>使击球员出局
examples: It's my first visit to New York.
You live in New York, don't you?
The trustee of at least 530 Countrywide trusts, Bank of New York Mellon, was less impressed.
Spokespeople for JPMorgan Chase in New York could not be reached for comment on Monday morning.
